title: After the First Time
description: First time the party wakes up post-wipe. Short, rueful, no blame. Triggered once per save.

steps.text: They came to on the side of the road. Nobody remembered exactly how. Their coin purses were lighter. Their pride was lighter. Everything else was, approximately, still there.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: I would prefer it not happen again.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: The inn is two hours back. We should go. Before our preferences are further consulted.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: For what it's worth — nobody ran.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: We were all unconscious. There was no running option.

steps.text: They walked back. Slowly. The conversation, for a while, was about other things.
